site.name: Sparkle & Shine
site.description: Professional cleaning services for your home and office. Bond cleaning, exit cleaning, carpet cleaning, and more.

features.title: Skilled & Trusted Cleaners
features.description: Our team is fully trained, insured, and committed to delivering spotless results with precision and professionalism.

features.title: Honest & Transparent Pricing
features.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. We provide upfront, affordable quotes so you know exactly what you're paying for.

features.title: Modern Tools & Proven Techniques
features.description: We use industry-grade equipment and smart cleaning methods to achieve faster, deeper, and longer-lasting results.

features.title: Vetted & Background Checked Cleaners
features.description: Our cleaners go through a rigorous hiring process to make sure your home is in safe hands.

features.title: Quick & Easy Booking
features.description: Getting your property cleaned is hassle-free. Just call, message, or book online — our friendly team will handle everything else.
